channel.title: Catalina on OneUFO
channel.description: Recent content in Catalina on OneUFO

item.title: MacOS Catalina 10.15 install PC
item.description: Tools： Etcher：https://www.balena.io/etcher DiskGenius：http://www.diskgenius.cn Clover Configurator Kext Utility MacOS Catalina 10.15： https://pan.baidu.com/s/1_Cyt8amRWXBIosKWQY71mw https://pan.baidu.com/s/1NUPGBclPIQdqJ0GhEv5YjA 笔记本触摸板驱动： ApplePS2SmartTouchPad_ .kext 无线网卡驱动： https://www.tp-link.com/en/support/download/tl-wn725n/v3/#Driver macOS Catalina Official Wallpaper (High resolution)
